block_00: How to trade Forex on margin?
block_01: It is here: a brand new way to trade your favorite assets on IQ Option — margin trading.
block_02: The main idea of trading with margin is the ability to trade with an amount of money larger than the initial deposit a trader has. A bigger investment in a deal has the potential to increase the profit as well, which is why this type of trading may be appealing to traders with a smaller trading budget.
block_03: Here is a full and detailed guide on how to trade Forex assets with a margin and how to understand the new traderoom. Don’t miss this article!
